message:
feat: inject skills content into subagent system prompt at dispatch

When a PluginAgent has Skills listed, spawnAgent resolves each skill
name via the parent session's skills map and appends the skill body
to the composed subagent system prompt. ResolveSkillContent supports
both exact and unnamespaced (plugin:name) matching.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
